name: JSF++: Shall/Will Deviation Dual-Approved
description: Breaking a 'shall' or 'will' (mandatory) rule is approved by BOTH the software engineering lead and the software product manager.
rationale: JSF++ AV Rule 5: to break a 'will' or a 'shall' rule, approval must be received from both the software engineering lead and the software product manager.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
